'''âz-m-j-y''' ('''shazamjeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:napoo|napoo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:napoo|napoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-m-j-y
|-
! Lemma
| shazamjeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizamjeyoko|thizamjeyoko]] || [[word:jizamjeyoko|jizamjeyoko]] || [[word:shizamjeyoko|shizamjeyoko]] || [[word:kizamjeyoko|kizamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzamjeyoko|thuthuzamjeyoko]] || [[word:jujuzamjeyoko|jujuzamjeyoko]] || [[word:shushuzamjeyoko|shushuzamjeyoko]] || [[word:kukuzamjeyoko|kukuzamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzamjeyoko|thuzamjeyoko]] || [[word:juzamjeyoko|juzamjeyoko]] || [[word:shuzamjeyoko|shuzamjeyoko]] || [[word:kuzamjeyoko|kuzamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzamjeyoko|thuzamjeyoko]] || [[word:juzamjeyoko|juzamjeyoko]] || [[word:shuzamjeyoko|shuzamjeyoko]] || [[word:kuzamjeyoko|kuzamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezamjeyoko|thezamjeyoko]] || [[word:jezamjeyoko|jezamjeyoko]] || [[word:shezamjeyoko|shezamjeyoko]] || [[word:kezamjeyoko|kezamjeyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozamjeyoko|thozamjeyoko]] || [[word:jozamjeyoko|jozamjeyoko]] || [[word:shozamjeyoko|shozamjeyoko]] || [[word:kozamjeyoko|kozamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozamjeyoko|thozamjeyoko]] || [[word:jozamjeyoko|jozamjeyoko]] || [[word:shozamjeyoko|shozamjeyoko]] || [[word:kozamjeyoko|kozamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzamjeyoko|thĂŠzamjeyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzamjeyoko|jĂŠzamjeyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzamjeyoko|shĂŠzamjeyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzamjeyoko|kĂŠzamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazamjeyoko|thathazamjeyoko]] || [[word:jajazamjeyoko|jajazamjeyoko]] || [[word:shashazamjeyoko|shashazamjeyoko]] || [[word:kakazamjeyoko|kakazamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazamjeyoko|thazamjeyoko]] || [[word:jazamjeyoko|jazamjeyoko]] || [[word:shazamjeyoko|shazamjeyoko]] || [[word:kazamjeyoko|kazamjeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazamjeyoko|thazamjeyoko]] || [[word:jazamjeyoko|jazamjeyoko]] || [[word:shazamjeyoko|shazamjeyoko]] || [[word:kazamjeyoko|kazamjeyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
